notes:
ăn mặc = to dress / to wear clothes (how someone styles themselves). It’s about overall appearance, not just one item of clothing.

Used to talk about someone’s style, level of formality, or taste. Often followed by an adjective to describe the look.

Close idea: diện (dress up, usually more stylish or for special occasions).
exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn ăn mặc rất lịch sự khi đi làm.
Em cảm thấy tự tin hơn khi ăn mặc đẹp.
Chị nên ăn mặc phù hợp với thời tiết hôm nay.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always dress very formally when going to work.
I feel more confident when I dress nicely.
You should dress appropriately for the weather today.
